2605.23190.title: Hidden Human-Like Nature of Machine-Generated Texts: Theory and Detection Enhancement
2605.23190.paper_summary: Machine-generated texts (MGTs) produced by large language models (LLMs) are increasingly prevalent across various applications, while their potential misuse in fake news propagation and phishing has raised serious concerns, highlighting the need for MGT detection. Existing paragraph-level detection methods commonly treat MGTs as entirely machine-like, overlooking the hidden human-like nature of machine-generated texts: even fully machine-generated texts may contain spans that are highly consistent with human writing. To this end, we first reveal the existence of such hidden human-like spans, and then theoretically analyze their impact on detection. Our analysis shows that these spans increase the sentence complexity for detection, thereby making MGT detection intrinsically harder. Based on this finding, we propose a model-agnostic stacked enhancement framework that improves existing detectors by reducing the influence of hidden human-like spans. Specifically, we model span-level retention decisions as a latent-variable problem and instantiate the optimization with a hard-EM-inspired procedure, where the detector iteratively filters confidently human-like subsequences and refines itself on the remaining text. Extensive experiments across various LLMs and practical scenarios demonstrate that the proposed framework consistently enhances existing detectors. Notably, the framework can also work in a training-free manner, offering flexibility and scalability for practical deployment.
2605.23190.paper_summary_zh: 機器生成文本（MGTs）由大型語言模型（LLMs）產生，正日益普及於各種應用中，但其在假新聞傳播和網絡釣魚中的潛在濫用引發了嚴重關注，突顯了對MGT檢測的需求。現有的段落級檢測方法通常將MGT視為完全機器化的，忽略了機器生成文本中隱藏的人類特徵：即使是完全由機器生成的文本也可能包含與人類寫作高度一致的片段。為此，我們首先揭示了這些隱藏的人類特徵片段的存在，然後對其對檢測的影響進行理論分析。我們的分析顯示，這些片段增加了檢測的句子複雜性，從而使MGT檢測本質上變得更加困難。基於這一發現，我們提出了一種模型無關的堆疊增強框架，通過減少隱藏人類特徵片段的影響來改進現有檢測器。具體而言，我們將片段級保留決策建模為潛變量問題，並用一種受硬EM啟發的過程進行優化，其中檢測器迭代地過濾出自信的人類特徵子序列，並在剩餘文本上進行自我精煉。在各種LLMs和實際場景中的廣泛實驗表明，所提出的框架始終增強現有檢測器。值得注意的是，該框架還可以以無需訓練的方式運作，為實際部署提供靈活性和可擴展性。
2605.23190.author: Chenwang Wu et.al.
2605.23190.authors: Chenwang Wu, Yiu-ming Cheung, Bo Han, Defu Lian
